description: Append-only audit log of every authority-tier promotion or demotion decision. See framework doc for schema, ban list, ceremony, and demotion triggers. Manual edits are forbidden — corrections are appended as new decision_type='correction' entries.

MDI.notes: Phase 3 data accumulating. First promotion review eligible when N>=30 DOMINANT-flagged COMPLETE events captured.

IG_SENTIMENT.notes: Display only. No promotion candidacy in scope.

NEWS_BIAS.notes: News safety gate (UTCC criterion 5) predates this framework and is grandfathered as an effective STRONG-tier gate. Not subject to this framework's machinery. Future news-derived signals (e.g. event surprise quantification) would be governed here.
